headline: Carrier to Present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) Chairman & CEO David Gitlin will speak at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, at 2:15 p.m. ET.

headline: Carrier CEO: North American Data Center Orders Surged 400% in Q4
summary: There is a moment when a company’s transformation stops being a story and starts being a scoreboard. For Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR), that moment may have arrived in Q4 2025. On the company’s February earnings call, CEO David Gitlin didn’t bury the lead. “Our data center orders in North America were up 400% in the fourth ... Carrier CEO: North American Data Center Orders Surged 400% in Q4
